evidence.content:
Help Center
Categories
- Getting started New to Otter? Here are the basics to get started with Otter.
- Using Otter From recording to creating groups, learn how Otter works from top to bottom.
- Meeting settings & recordings Learn about managing your settings and features for your online meetings.
- Otter Enterprise Learn how to use and manage Otter Enterprise features.
- Otter Workspaces Learn how to manage your team in Otter.
- Integrations Connect, simplify, and automate. Discover the power of apps.
- Account settings & billing Adjust your settings and manage your billing in Otter.
- Announcements
Tips & shortcuts
Otter Chat & Quick Search
      
        Press ⌘/Ctrl + K to open the search bar to ask Otter Chat or search for conversations.
      
    Manage Otter Notetaker Settings
      All Notetaker settings (e.g., auto-share, auto-join) can be managed in Account Settings > Meetings.
      
    Record without headphones
      Download our Desktop app to record meetings without headphones.
      
    Promoted articles
- What is Otter?
- Otter.ai features
- Otter Quick Start Guide
- Otter Recording Best Practices: Pause, Resume and Upload
- Custom Meeting Type Templates
- Otter AI Chat Overview

- Troubleshoot audio recording problems
- Conversation Page Overview 🆕
- Fix problems importing files to Otter
- Set up Otter Notetaker to join your Zoom meeting
- Automatically add Otter Notetaker to your meetings
- Manage your Otter Notetaker settings
- Stop Otter Notetaker from automatically joining your meetings
- 🚀 Otter.ai Enterprise Onboarding Guide
- Enterprise Admin Controls Overview
- Otter HubSpot for Enterprise
- Otter Salesforce for Enterprise
- HIPAA | Otter.ai
- Workspace Overview
- Otter Workspace Admin Guide
- Invite members to join your Workspace
- Managing your Workspace trial members
- Understanding how seats (licenses) work
- Zapier <> Otter.ai Integration
- Connect Salesforce with Otter.ai
- Connect Slack to Otter.ai
- Connect HubSpot with Otter.ai
- My paid subscription is not showing
- Contact Otter.ai Support
- Otter transcript missing audio when using a Chrome browser

description.value: Otter AI is a transcription service that records and transcribes meetings.
